char_overview: A reliable 狩灵协会2科 operative without standout individual combat ability but stable performance in routine operations. Natural mentor for newcomers and dependable anchor in squad deployments.
char_looks: Brown long hair, high ponytail. Brown, steady and focused eyes. 狩灵协会2科 standard: white hooded jacket, black tight-fitting casual wear, chest armor, black pants, combat boots. 制式太刀, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Channels 灵力 to amplify cutting power and impact force, with effect scaling to the 灵力 infused.
char_flaws: Lacks individual combat capability. Tends to overextend protecting teammates. Quietly aware of her own mediocrity.
char_mission: Keep her teammates alive and herself out of their way.
